mentions.note: Up 15% YoY on shortage, dollar weakness, geopolitical uncertainty. Own gold, don't trade it.
Volatility matching 2011 peak (preceded 50% correction); RSI in mid-90s; broken multi-decade trendline at 2900; hit 5100 yesterday; technical setup suggests potential trend reversal or blowoff.
Long-time gold bug; up to 10% allocation appropriate as hedge; turned out to be better than stocks lately; anything more is oversized bet.

Gold trading as speculative asset, not hedge. Down 14% Feb-March amid inflation fears while stocks fell 8%. Seasonal and 18-month cycle charts scream pullback through June. Consider taking profits on big gains.
Down despite Middle East war turmoil because speculators liquidating to raise SpaceX IPO cash, not true hedging demand.
